Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interroggatories- General Set One, Number 12.1
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant McKesson Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories-General, Set One, Number 12.1 is granted. Plaintiff's response and supplemental response are inadequate. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The right to amend or supplement the response is ordered stricken. Any amended responses must be made in compliance with C.C.P. Section 2030.310. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-30-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories-General, Set One
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories ' General, Set One, is granted.
All reservations of a reservation of a right to amend, supplement, or modify responses after the completion of discovery are improper. All responses shall be full and complete at the time they are made. The procedures to be followed to amend or supplement any response are set forth in C.C.P. Section 2030.310.
The motion is granted as to Number 6.4 as the objections are overruled and ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Numbers 8.7, 12.1, and 12.6 as the objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses are inadequate. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further.
The motion is granted as to Numbers 8.8, 12.2, and 12.3 as the objections are overruled and ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Number 50.1. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The response is inadequate. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further. The court will not determine adequacy of the supplemental responses.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
